data.name: IamError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during IAM operation.

data.name: IamError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in IAM.

data.name: IamError.WeakPassword
data.value: The new password must contain at least 6 characters.

data.name: IamError.InvalidRole
data.value: The requested role is not allowed.

data.name: IamError.ForbiddenOperation
data.value: You are not allowed to perform this IAM operation.
